The '''Bestine Chamber of Commerce''', together with the [[Tatooine Moisture Farm Collective/Legends|Tatooine Moisture Farm Collective]], once employed hunters on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to kill wild creatures known to damage the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|moisture vaporators]].<ref name="SWG:KtWF" />

{{Stub}}
